description: Autonomous research and intelligence gathering from trusted real-world sources including academic journals, official documentation, and reputable news outlets.

tools.name: web_search_trusted
tools.description: Search for high-fidelity information from authoritative domains and trusted sources.

trusted_domains_only.description: Restrict results to verified high-authority domains

tools.name: extract_source_content
tools.description: Extract cleaned text, metadata, and citations from a specific source URL.

url.description: The URL to extract content from

bypass_clutter.description: Remove ads, navigation, and irrelevant sidebars

tools.name: synthesize_report
tools.description: Aggregate gathered research data into a structured report with markdown formatting and source citations.

topic.description: The main subject of the report

collected_data.description: Raw data chunks or snippets extracted from sources

sources.description: List of source URLs to be cited

tools.name: intelligence_scan
tools.description: Perform a multi-source deep dive on a specific entity, company, or market trend.

entity_name.description: The name of the entity or trend to scan

tools.name: early_adopter_discovery
tools.description: Identify potential beta testers and early adopters on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Reddit based on user profiles and discussions

tools.name: product_hunt_tracker
tools.description: Monitor launch performance, upvotes, and mentions on Product Hunt for our product and competitors
